title: rcsi.exe
html:
rcsi.exe

Non-Interactive command line inerface included with Visual Studio.

Paths

  • no default

Commands

Execute

Use embedded C# within the csx script to execute the code.

Use case: Local execution of arbitrary C# code stored in local CSX file.

Privileges: User

rcsi.exe {PATH:.csx}

AWL Bypass

Use embedded C# within the csx script to execute the code.

Use case: Local execution of arbitrary C# code stored in local CSX file.

Privileges: User

rcsi.exe {PATH:.csx}
